name: test_e2e_with_logs[757_HHI_PORT_001]
description:
## Attack Pattern Information

| Item | Value |
|------|-------|
| **Pattern ID** | `HHI_PORT_001` |
| **Name** | Port injection via Host |
| **Category** | HOST_HEADER |
| **Subcategory** | port_injection |
| **Severity** | `HIGH` |

## Attack Details

- **Payload**: `x-host:good.com:8443@evil.com`
- **Encoded**: `x-host%3Agood.com%3A8443%40evil.com`
- **Expected Detection**: Yes

## Test Execution Results

- **Status**: `PASSED`
- **Detection Count**: 1 / 1
- **Latency**: ~27000ms
- **Timestamp**: 04:21:18.000 UTC

## Rule Mapping

| Item | Value |
|------|-------|
| **Expected Rule** | `[NGINX Host Header] Host header injection attempt detected` |
| **Matched Rule** | `[NGINX Host Header] Host header injection attempt detected test_id=HHI_PORT_001-1772511678372-x06iu pattern_id=HHI_PORT_001 uri=/?q=x-host%3Agood.com%3A8443%40evil.com client=127.0.0.1` |
| **Rule Match** | ✅ Match |

## Detection Evidence
